# vault-lint

> Weekly vault hygiene scan for markdown knowledge bases — broken wikilinks, contradictions, cross-layer drift, knowledge gaps. Severity-tagged report. Read-only by default. Plain Markdown, no DB.

Audits a Markdown vault against the conventions in `vault-conventions`. Surfaces what's broken, stale, or contradictory. Reports; does not auto-fix.

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-lint/main/README.md): what gets audited, severity tags, how to interpret reports.
- [SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-lint/main/SKILL.md): the skill itself.
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-lint/main/AGENTS.md): operating protocol for agents installing this for an operator.

## Implementation

- [Launchd plists](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-lint/tree/main/launchd): macOS periodic cron config.
- [Examples](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-lint/tree/main/examples): sanitized example reports.

## Related

- [vault-conventions](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-conventions): the conventions vault-lint audits against.
- [ai-knowledge-system](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/ai-knowledge-system): the memory pattern these conventions support.

## Optional

- [LICENSE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-lint/main/LICENSE): MIT.
